dialog.confirmError: Could not complete the action. Please try again.

auth.registerSuccess: Account created! Check your email for a welcome message.

landing.heroSubtitle: PictaVoz helps you build visual sentences, hear them aloud, and customize boards for each person. Simple, accessible, and available in Spanish and English.
landing.heroNote: Free to start · No credit card required
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for families, teachers, and therapists who want a clear, friendly tool.

communicate.title: Build sentences
communicate.description: Tap pictograms to build phrases and listen with one button.

boards.title: Custom boards
boards.description: Edit, hide, or add pictograms. Create multiple boards for different contexts.

voice.title: Built-in voice
voice.description: Each pictogram is read aloud to reinforce communication.

share.title: Share boards
share.description: Send a link so someone else can copy your board to their account.

landing.createDescription: Upload photos of real objects, places, or people. Communication reflects the world of the person using it.
landing.createCardText: Custom pictograms live alongside a full catalog ready to use from day one.
landing.stepsSubtitle: You can communicate with PictaVoz in minutes.

one.title: Create your account
one.text: Sign up free with email and password.

two.title: Choose pictograms
two.text: Tap pictos to build your sentence on the Communicate screen.

three.title: Customize
three.text: Adapt boards, create your own pictos, and share them with others.

landing.ctaDescription: Join PictaVoz and discover a clear, visual, human way to express yourself.

communicate.title: Communicate
communicate.emptySentence: Tap pictograms below to build your sentence

board.title: My board
board.pageSubtitle: Customize the pictograms you use to communicate.
board.usingDefault: You are using the default board
board.defaultHint: When you edit, hide, or create a pictogram, your personal board will be created (a copy of the default plus your changes).
board.personalHint: Changes only affect you. You can have multiple boards and switch between them.
board.maxBoardsReached: You reached the maximum number of boards allowed
board.resetConfirm: Delete the active board? Its changes and custom pictograms will be lost.

share.title: Shared board
share.subtitle: Someone shared a pictogram board with you.
share.loginRequired: Create an account or log in to copy this board to your profile.
share.importSuccess: Board copied! You can use it from My board.
share.notFound: This link is invalid or the board no longer exists
share.maxBoardsReached: You already have the maximum of {max} boards. Delete one to copy this board.

create.title: Create pictogram
create.fillAllFields: Fill in all fields and select an image
create.forkNotice: Saving will create your personal board if you don't have one yet.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Manage system pictograms and registered users.

pictograms.title: Default pictograms
pictograms.subtitle: Edit name, category, emoji, or image. Changes apply for all users.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Global application parameters.
settings.maxBoardsHint: Maximum number of personal boards each user can create (1–50).
